289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

402.issue_title: tooling: Expose JSON data in MCP tools

cycles.name: Quality Gates Verbose Option

deliverables.description: Add verbose: bool = Field(default=False, ...) to RunQualityGatesInput in mcp_server/tools/quality_tools.py.
Add details: str = "" field to GateResultDTO in mcp_server/schemas/tool_outputs.py.
Update QAManager.run_quality_gates and _execute_gate to accept verbose: bool and populate GateResultDTO.details with process stdout/stderr when verbose is enabled.
Update RunQualityGatesTool.execute to propagate verbose to the manager, and to generate a RecoveryNote on failures when verbose=False.
Update tests/mcp_server/unit/tools/test_quality_tools.py and tests/mcp_server/unit/managers/test_qa_manager.py to cover the new verbose options and RecoveryNotes.

cycles.exit_criteria: run_quality_gates with verbose=True populates the details field with stdout/stderr upon failure, and caching of this DTO is verified. Running with verbose=False leaves details empty but generates a RecoveryNote on failure.
